pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":["大部分 Debian 的软件源配置文件使用传统的 One-Line-Style，路径为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list"}],"；但是对于容器镜像，从 Debian 12 开始，其软件源配置文件变更为 DEB822 格式，路径为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/debian.sources"}],"。一般情况下，将对应文件中 Debian 默认的源地址 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"http://deb.debian.org/"}]," 替换为镜像地址即可。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Debian Buster 以上版本默认支持 HTTPS 源。如果遇到无法拉取 HTTPS 源的情况，请先使用 HTTP 源并安装："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"传统格式etcaptsourceslist","children":["传统格式（",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list"}],"）"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"Debian 版本","items":[["Debian 13 (trixie)",{"release":"trixie","security":"-security","nonfree":" non-free non-free-firmware"}],["Debian 12 (bookworm)",{"release":"bookworm","security":"-security","nonfree":" non-free non-free-firmware"}],["Debian 11 (bullseye)",{"release":"bullseye","security":"-security","nonfree":" non-free"}],["testing",{"release":"testing","security":"-security","nonfree":" non-free non-free-firmware"}],["sid",{"release":"sid","sid":true,"nonfree":" non-free non-free-firmware"}]]},{"title":"启用源码源","note":"源码源通常用于构建和调试，开启后影响更新速度","name":"src","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "},{"title":"使用非自由软件源","name":"nf","defaultValue":true,"trueValue":true,"falseValue":false},{"title":"强制安全更新使用镜像","note":"为了更及时地获得安全更新，不推荐使用镜像站安全更新软件源","name":"mirror_security","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":true,"falseValue":false}],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"properties","filepath":"/etc/apt/sources.list","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"deb822-格式etcaptsourceslistddebiansources","children":["DEB822 格式（",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/debian.sources"}],"）"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"Debian 版本","items":[["Debian 13 (trixie)",{"release_deb822":"trixie"}],["Debian 12 (bookworm)",{"release_deb822":"bookworm"}],["testing",{"release_deb822":"testing"}],["sid",{"release_deb822":"sid","sid":true}]]},{"title":"启用源码源","note":"源码源通常用于构建和调试，开启后影响更新速度","name":"src","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "},{"title":"使用非自由软件源","name":"nf","defaultValue":true,"trueValue":true,"falseValue":false},{"title":"强制安全更新使用镜像","note":"为了更及时地获得安全更新，不推荐使用镜像站安全更新软件源","name":"mirror_security","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":true,"falseValue":false}],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"yaml","filepath":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/debian.sources","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["为了方便快速配置，此处一并附上了 debian-security 的配置，一般来说，镜像站会同时提供 debian-security，为了更准确的信息您可以前往 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../debian-security/","children":"Debian Security 帮助"}]," 确认。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["不过，一般来说，为了更及时地获得安全更新，不推荐使用镜像站安全更新软件源，因为镜像站往往有同步延迟。参考 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://www.debian.org/security/faq.en.html#mirror","rel":"nofollow","children":"https://www.debian.org/security/faq.en.html#mirror"}]]}],"
",["$r","blockquote",null,{"children":["
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"The purpose of security.debian.org is to make security updates available as quickly and easily as possible."}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Encouraging the use of unofficial mirrors would add extra complexity that is usually not needed and that can cause frustration if these mirrors are not kept up to date."}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"openmediavault","children":"OpenMediaVault"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["本节供 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../OpenMediaVault/","children":"OpenMediaVault 帮助"}],"使用。"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"关于 debian-security 可以参考上文的说明。"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"connection-reset-by-peer","children":"Connection reset by peer"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["在 apt 2.1.9 及以后的版本中，apt 的 HTTP Pipelining 特性与 Nginx 服务器疑似存在一定的不兼容问题，可能导致高带宽从镜像站下载大量软件包
（例如系统升级）时出现偶发的 Connection reset by peer 错误
（详见 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=973581","rel":"nofollow","children":"Debian bug #973581"}],"）。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["目前，用户可以通过关闭 HTTP Pipelining 特性解决此问题。
如果需要关闭，可以在使用 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"apt"}]," 命令时加上 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"-o Acquire::http::Pipeline-Depth=0"}]," 参数，
或使用以下命令将相关设置加入 apt 系统配置中："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-4","codeLanguage":"bash"}]]}]
